# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prep
  - build
  - deploy
  - release

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"
  GITLAB_API: "$CI_API_V4_URL"
  NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL: ""
  DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX: "deploy"
  RELEASE_NOTES_FILE: "release_notes.md"

workflow:
  rules:
    - when: always

.default_git_identity:
  before_script:
    - git config user.email "${GITLAB_USER_EMAIL:-ci@example.com}"
    - git config user.name "${GITLAB_USER_NAME:-gitlab-ci}"

prepare_mr_context:
  stage: prep
  image: alpine:3.20
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
      when: always
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE != "merge_request_event"'
      when: always
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
    - |
      if [ -n "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-}" ]; then
        MR_API="${GITLAB_API}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
        MR_JSON="$(curl -sfS --header "JOB-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" "${MR_API}")"
        MR_TITLE="$(echo "${MR_JSON}" | jq -r '.title // ""')"
        MR_DESC="$(echo "${MR_JSON}" | jq -r '.description // ""')"
        MR_URL="$(echo "${MR_JSON}" | jq -r '.web_url // ""')"
        MR_IID="$(echo "${MR_JSON}" | jq -r '.iid // ""')"
        MR_SOURCE_BRANCH="$(echo "${MR_JSON}" | jq -r '.source_branch // ""')"
      else
        MR_TITLE="${CI_COMMIT_TITLE:-}"
        MR_DESC="${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE:-}"
        MR_URL="${CI_PROJECT_URL}/-/commit/${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
        MR_IID=""
        MR_SOURCE_BRANCH="${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
      fi
    - |
      sanitize() {
        echo "$1" \
          | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' \
          | sed -E 's/[^a-z0-9]+/-/g; s/^-+//; s/-+$//' \
          | cut -c1-48
      }
    - MR_TITLE_SLUG="$(sanitize "${MR_TITLE}")"
    - |
      {
        echo "MR_TITLE<<EOF"
        printf "%s\n" "${MR_TITLE}"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_DESCRIPTION<<EOF"
        printf "%s\n" "${MR_DESC}"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_URL=${MR_URL}"
        echo "MR_IID=${MR_IID}"
        echo "MR_SOURCE_BRANCH=${MR_SOURCE_BRANCH}"
        echo "MR_TITLE_SLUG=${MR_TITLE_SLUG}"
      } > mr.env
    - |
      {
        echo "# Release Notes"
        echo
        if [ -n "${MR_IID}" ]; then
          echo "- ${MR_TITLE} (!${MR_IID})"
        else
          echo "- ${MR_TITLE}"
        fi
        echo
        if [ -n "${MR_URL}" ]; then
          echo "Link: ${MR_URL}"
          echo
        fi
        if [ -n "${MR_DESC}" ]; then
          echo "## Description"
          echo
          printf "%s\n" "${MR_DESC}"
          echo
        fi
      } > "${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: mr.env
    paths:
      - $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
    expire_in: 1 week

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs: ["prepare_mr_context"]
  script:
    - echo "Building for: ${MR_TITLE}"
    - echo "MR: ${MR_URL}"
    - echo "Description:"
    - printf "%s\n" "${MR_DESCRIPTION}"

notify_build:
  stage: build
  image: curlimages/curl:8.10.1
  needs: ["prepare_mr_context", "build"]
  rules:
    - if: '$NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL != ""'
      when: always
    - when: manual
      allow_failure: true
  script:
    - |
      payload="$(cat <<JSON
      {
        "project": "${CI_PROJECT_PATH}",
        "pipeline_id": "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}",
        "pipeline_url": "${CI_PIPELINE_URL}",
        "ref": "${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}",
        "sha": "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}",
        "mr": {
          "iid": "${MR_IID}",
          "title": ${MR_TITLE@Q},
          "description": ${MR_DESCRIPTION@Q},
          "url": "${MR_URL}"
        },
        "event": "build"
      }
JSON
      )"
    - curl -sS -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "${payload}" "${NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL}"

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs: ["prepare_mr_context", "build"]
  extends: [".default_git_identity"]
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: on_success
    - when: manual
      allow_failure: true
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache git curl jq
    - |
      TAG_TS="$(date -u +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"
      TAG_NAME="${DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX}/${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME:-prod}/${TAG_TS}-${MR_TITLE_SLUG}"
      echo "DEPLOY_TAG=${TAG_NAME}" > deploy.env
    - git fetch --tags
    - |
      TAG_MESSAGE="$(cat <<EOF
      Deploy: ${MR_TITLE}
      Project: ${CI_PROJECT_PATH}
      Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}
      MR: ${MR_URL}
      ---
      ${MR_DESCRIPTION}
EOF
      )"
    - git tag -a "${TAG_NAME}" -m "${TAG_MESSAGE}" "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
    - git push "https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git" "${TAG_NAME}"
    - echo "Deploy tag created: ${TAG_NAME}"
    - |
      if [ -n "${NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL:-}" ]; then
        payload="$(cat <<JSON
        {
          "project": "${CI_PROJECT_PATH}",
          "pipeline_id": "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}",
          "pipeline_url": "${CI_PIPELINE_URL}",
          "environment": "${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME:-prod}",
          "sha": "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}",
          "deploy_tag": "${TAG_NAME}",
          "mr": {
            "iid": "${MR_IID}",
            "title": ${MR_TITLE@Q},
            "description": ${MR_DESCRIPTION@Q},
            "url": "${MR_URL}"
          },
          "event": "deploy"
        }
JSON
        )"
        curl -sS -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "${payload}" "${NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL}"
      fi
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: deploy.env
    expire_in: 1 week

commit_release_notes:
  stage: release
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs: ["prepare_mr_context", "deploy"]
  extends: [".default_git_identity"]
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: on_success
    - when: manual
      allow_failure: true
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache git
    - git checkout -B "${CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH}" "origin/${CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH}"
    - mkdir -p .release-notes
    - |
      NOTES_PATH=".release-notes/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}-${MR_TITLE_SLUG}.md"
      cp "${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}" "${NOTES_PATH}"
    - git add "${NOTES_PATH}"
    - |
      COMMIT_MSG="$(cat <<EOF
      Release notes: ${MR_TITLE}

      MR: ${MR_URL}
      Deploy tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG:-}
EOF
      )"
    - git commit -m "${COMMIT_MSG}" || echo "No release notes changes to commit."
    - git push "https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git" "HEAD:${CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH}" || true

create_gitlab_release:
  stage: release
  image: registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/release-cli:latest
  needs: ["prepare_mr_context", "deploy"]
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: on_success
    - when: manual
      allow_failure: true
  script:
    - echo "Creating GitLab Release for ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
  release:
    name: "Deployment: $MR_TITLE"
    tag_name: "$DEPLOY_TAG"
    description: "Deployed feature: $MR_TITLE\n\nMR: $MR_URL\n\n$MR_DESCRIPTION"
